note: Shared rails (math/storage/gate), separate cars (retrieval/scoring). Caught a summary-path conflation in 06/07.

claim: NET-NEW (M/S) correctness-class, the substrate FLOOR: cosineSimilarity defined 3x byte-equivalent (semantic-trigger-matcher.ts:174, memory-summaries.ts:29, save-quality-gate.ts:666) + BLOB<->Float32 converters 2x. Collapse into one lib/cache/vector-math.ts. ~3 call-site refactor, no flag.

NET-NEW (H/L): one EmbeddableChannel = {embed(text,inputKind)->store; retrieve(qVec)->scored; gate} shape that triggers/summaries/(future)edges instantiate. Each reimplements the same loop today; embedding_cache is already input_kind-partitioned (embedding-cache.ts:151,157) and trigger writes to it (trigger-embedding-backfill.ts:274-292).

EXTENDS 028/007 #4 (M/M): migrate summary embeddings off the bespoke memory_summaries.summary_embedding BLOB + brute-force JS scan of max(limit*10,1000) rows (memory-summaries.ts:120-192) onto shared embedding_cache + sqlite-vec vec_distance_cosine/vec0 the MAIN lane uses (vector-index-queries.ts:164,450,539). Summary is the only channel not on shared cache + only one scanning in JS where ANN exists.

EXTENDS 028/007 Initiative A (H/M): implement per-edge embeddings as FIRST consumer of the interface — synthesize edge fact-text -> embed() with input_kind='edge' (one CHECK widening embedding-cache.ts:151) -> retrieve via vec0. Cache PK already carries input_kind (:157) so edge vectors slot in WITHOUT a new table — collapses '5 candidates need the same substrate' into '5 need ONE input_kind + shared retrieve()'. Still prove-first; LLM-dedup keeps silent-merge tail-risk.

NET-NEW cross-channel; EXTENDS 027 shadow doctrine (H/M): one gate (overlap-vs-lexical, top-score band, FP-proxy) over every embeddable channel. Today 3 unrelated mechanisms: trigger bespoke threshold-band w/ union-promotion BLOCKED (semantic-trigger-matcher.ts:442-515); summary has NO gate, default-on into stage1 (stage1-candidate-gen.ts:1355-1357), riskiest; feedback-ranking own harness (shadow-evaluation-runtime.ts). A8's gate reusable only once they share the interface.

GROUNDING CORRECTION to 06/07: 028/007 #4's 'summaries are fallback-only, not in the main blend' conflates two paths — the summary-EMBEDDING channel (memory-summaries -> stage1-candidate-gen.ts:1301) is a LIVE default-on stage-1 candidate appender, distinct from the community-summary weak-result fallback (memory-search.ts:1158). Correctly absent from the WEIGHTED RRF list (hybrid-search.ts:1310) but NOT inert. 07 MEM-fused-summary-channel scope should distinguish the two.
